query:
SELECT id, email, step, membershipTier, membershipType, contractSignedAt, joiningFeePaidAt, expiresAt, createdAt 
FROM join_sessions 
WHERE email = 'lulusharris@yahoo.com' 
ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
